Title: Career Overview
Highlights: Developed new workflows and optimized existing software solutions across the stack for the successful launch of EpicU, Epic’s multi-million dollar end-user training management application.
Reduced the training billing process by 60%, enabling Finance to manage a 4x increase in training volume post-EpicU launch.
Centralized the Go-Live scheduling process, streamlining a week-long process to a day.
Modernized e-learning platform with progress and completion tracking, supporting hundreds of billable training from new asynchronous training tracks
Bullets: Languages: C#, JavaScript, TypeScript, C, C++, Python
Frameworks: Vue, React, .NET, ASP.NET Core, Node, Angular
Tools: Git, GitHub Actions, Jira, SVN, NuGet, Splunk

Certifications.Name: Develop AI-enabled apps using the GitHub Copilot SDK
